name: NeSy-Route: A Neuro-Symbolic Benchmark for Constrained Route Planning in Remote Sensing

description: arXiv:2603.16307v3 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Remote sensing underpins crucial applications such as disaster relief and ecological field surveys, where systems must understand complex scenes and constraints and make reliable decisions. Current remote-sensing benchmarks mainly focus on evaluating perception and reasoning capabilities of multimodal large language models (MLLMs). They fail t...
author: Ming Yang, Zhi Zhou, Shi-Yu Tian, Kun-Yang Yu, Lan-Zhe Guo, Yu-Feng Li
